name: Transcendosaurus Glaciasaurus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>越</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>グレイスザウルス
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Cannot be destroyed by battle. Dinosaur monsters you control that were Special Summoned from the GY cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects, also your opponent cannot target them with card effects. If this card is destroyed: You can shuffle 1 Normal Monster from your GY into the Deck, then you can Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Transcendosaurus Glaciasaurus" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
